name: Multi-EMA Trend Alignment
description: Require EMA stack alignment (e.g., 200/50/13 all pointing same direction).

name: VWAP Flat/Chop Detector
description: Skip entries when VWAP slope is flat (range-bound market detection).

name: Volume Above Average
description: Only enter when current bar volume exceeds Nx moving average volume.

name: Session Time Window Gate
description: Only allow entries during specific session windows.

name: Candle Close Strength
description: Only enter if candle closes in top/bottom N% of its range (strong close).

name: Max Trades Per Day
description: Limit maximum number of entries per session.

name: Multi-Factor Confidence Score
description: Composite score from HTF analysis, market structure, session quality, volatility, volume profile.

name: Max Opening Range Size
description: Skip if opening range > N% of price (too volatile for reliable breakout).

name: SuperTrend Confirmation
description: Use SuperTrend indicator as trend confirmation filter to reject counter-trend entries.

name: Minervini Trend Template
description: Stage-2 uptrend qualification using Minervini criteria (50MA > 150MA > 200MA, etc.).

name: Cycle Zone / Round Number Detection
description: Identify Full Cycle Zones from pivot lows and round-number psychological levels as confluence.
